cmd: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git curl python3 python3-pip python3-venv wget && curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && ollama serve & sleep 10 && ollama pull qwen3:8b && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/SohniSwatantra/autoresearch.git . && pip install requests beautifulsoup4 pandas && uv sync && bash run_pipeline.sh
